member.param: The ID of the item to retrieve

member.param: The ID of the item to update

member.name: T:MyWeatherApi.Models.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Standard API response wrapper for all API endpoints

member.name: P:MyWeatherApi.Models.ApiResponse`1.Success
member.summary: Indicates if the request was successful

member.name: P:MyWeatherApi.Models.ApiResponse`1.Message
member.summary: Message providing additional information about the response

member.name: P:MyWeatherApi.Models.ApiResponse`1.Data
member.summary: The data returned by the API

member.summary: Creates a successful response with data

member.name: M:MyWeatherApi.Models.ApiResponse`1.ErrorResponse(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failure response with a message
